description: 139 - 19-03-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Michael Ellam Second Permanent Secretary, European Union and International
text:
Second Permanent Secretary, European Union and International

Economic Affairs, CO)

Sent: Wed 19/03/2025 12:29:08 AM (UTC)

To: Peter Mandelson| Personal ]
